title: Lever 2: H4 sweet-spot + honest cost modeling
source: 2026-05-26 "5 palancas" lever 2; reinforced by H4 EVENT_DENSITY_BIAS finding.
why: D1 = ~250 events/y; H4 = ~1500; M15 = ~25000. More events = better statistical power, BUT costs scale linearly. Math: edge >> cost only if cost ≤ 0.5bp (institutional) OR per-trade gross > 20bp. For retail (cost_bps 5-15), **H4 is the sweet spot** — enough events to power statistics, gross gains still cover costs. Currently `cost_bps` is a config knob applied uniformly; no audit reports cost-sensitivity.
value_rationale: M (B0016a is universal hygiene; B0016b is the only path to honest H4 evaluation)
